chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. No. D-3191 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge FRESH CASE. 1. For orders on Office Objection No. 1 to 3. 2. For orders on CMA No.13875/2025. 3. For orders on CMA No.13876/2025. 4. For hearing of main case. 29.09.2025. No one is in attendance on behalf of the Petitioner and no intimation has been received. The Petition is dismissed for non- prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE MUBASHIR
